mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_hazard_report WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_hazard_report WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_hazard_report WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_hazard_report WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cas_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_hazard_report ( report_year, chemical_name, cas_number, hazard_class, annual_handling, handling_facility, report_deadline, submit_date, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{reportYear}, #{chemicalName}, #{casNumber}, #{hazardClass}, #{annualHandling}, #{handlingFacility}, #{reportDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, #{submitDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_hazard_report SET report_year = #{reportYear}, chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, hazard_class = #{hazardClass}, annual_handling = #{annualHandling}, handling_facility = #{handlingFacility}, report_deadline = #{reportDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, submit_date = #{submitDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_hazard_report SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
